message:
feat(webhook): Cx-first trait extension + WebhookDispatcher pipe-through (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Extends the Cx-first migration to the webhook notification path.
`WebhookTransport` trait gains a `send_with_cx` default method.
`WebhookDispatcher` gains `dispatch_payload_with_cx` + a
`send_with_cx` override on its `NotificationSender` impl so caller
cx propagates all the way to the transport layer.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/webhook.rs (+80 src)

   a. `WebhookTransport::send_with_cx` default method.

      Default delegates to `send(url, headers, body)`. Concrete
      implementations with a Cx-aware HTTP client (e.g. one routed
      through `asupersync::http`) SHOULD override this method to
      propagate caller cx into the underlying cancellable request.

   b. `WebhookDispatcher::dispatch_payload_with_cx` method.

      Cx-first counterpart to `dispatch_payload`. Iterates enabled
      matching endpoints and calls `transport.send_with_cx(cx, url,
      headers, body)` for each — so cx flows through the endpoint
      loop to the transport boundary.

   c. `WebhookDispatcher::send_with_cx` override on
      `NotificationSender` impl.

      Routes through `dispatch_payload_with_cx(cx, payload)`
      instead of the ambient `dispatch_payload(payload)`. The
      NotificationPipeline Cx-first chain (tick 25) →
      NotificationSender trait (tick 34) →
      WebhookDispatcher::send_with_cx (this commit) → transport
      now delegates cx through each hop.

   Legacy paths preserved; strictly additive.

Impact: a notification pipeline with a webhook sender backed by a
Cx-aware HTTP transport (e.g. future DistributedHttpClient wiring)
will propagate caller cancellation through the entire chain —
gate check → sender dispatch → webhook endpoint loop → HTTP
request. Current DefaultTransport still uses ambient Cx but the
trait seam is in place for migration.

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib webhook::: 77/77 pass
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
